# Code of Conduct

## Our Standard

Participation in this repository should stay respectful, constructive, and focused on the technical work.

Examples of expected behavior:

- be respectful in discussions and reviews
- assume good intent and discuss technical tradeoffs directly
- keep feedback specific, actionable, and relevant to the code or documentation

Examples of unacceptable behavior:

- harassment, insults, or personal attacks
- discriminatory or exclusionary language
- repeated off-topic disruption in issues, reviews, or discussions

## Scope

This code of conduct applies to repository issues, pull requests, review comments, and other project communication channels.

## Enforcement

Project maintainers may remove, edit, or reject comments, issues, commits, or other contributions that do not follow this code of conduct.

## Reporting

If you experience or witness unacceptable behavior, report it privately using one of these contact paths:

- email: 7260230+apajon@users.noreply.github.com
- GitHub private contact or maintainer contact path, when available
